name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose Essex, Maryland — Loan For Any Purpose offers same-day cash advances, payday loans, title loans, and personal loans up to $50,000 a...
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose operates a physical storefront at 3403 Grand River Ave in Detroit, MI, positioning itself as a quick-access lender for consumers needing immediate cash. The company advertises a broad portfolio of lending products designed to serve customers across the credit spectrum, from those with poor credit to those seeking larger personal loans. Their Detroit location maintains extended hours (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends) to accommodate working customers, with a local phone line (313-228-3440) for inquiries.

The company's primary offerings include cash advances under $1,000, payday loans up to $1,000, title loans secured by vehicle equity up to $50,000, installment loans between $1,000–$5,000, personal loans up to $50,000, and same-day unsecured loans. They explicitly market products to "all credit types" and "bad credit" borrowers, positioning themselves as an accessible alternative to traditional banking. Their title loan product allows borrowers to leverage vehicle collateral for larger amounts, while unsecured options serve those without collateral.

Loan For Any Purpose distinguishes itself through rapid approval timelines (same-day funding advertised) and minimal documentation requirements. They accept applicants across credit quality tiers and do not report soft inquiries to FICO® scores during the application phase. The company appears to operate a multi-location model, with the Atlanta address (2197 Cheshire Bridge Rd NE) listed as a corporate or regional hub, suggesting a broader national or regional network.

However, prospective borrowers should note that this company operates in the high-cost short-term lending space. No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules are disclosed on the website, which is typical for payday and title lenders but obscures the true cost of borrowing. The fine print emphasizes that loans are "not intended as a long-term borrowing solution" and recommends credit counseling for borrowers with ongoing difficulties—a candid acknowledgment of the products' limitations. Qualification and loan amounts are subject to approval and may not meet advertised maximums.
address: 112 Back River Neck Rd #10, Essex, MD 21221

company_info.headquarters: 112 Back River Neck Rd #10, Essex, MD 21221

pros: Same-day and fast approval with minimal documentation required
All credit types welcome, including bad credit borrowers
Extended operating hours (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends) for accessibility
Multiple product options ranging from $250–$50,000 depending on loan type
Title loans allow customers to borrow up to $50,000 using vehicle equity
Soft inquiry during application does not affect FICO® credit score
Physical location with direct phone support for in-person assistance
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed on website—true borrowing cost is hidden
Company explicitly states loans are not for long-term needs, indicating high-cost short-term products
Qualification is not guaranteed; advertised loan amounts may not be available to all applicants
Title loans carry collateral risk and potential vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Fine print recommends credit counseling, suggesting products may trap borrowers in debt cycles
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash under $1,000 with same-day or next-day funding
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional bank loans
Vehicle owners seeking short-term liquidity through title-secured collateral loans
Workers paid on irregular schedules needing quick cash between paychecks
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who need cash within hours and lack access to traditional credit. However, borrowers should be aware that no pricing information is publicly disclosed, and the company's own disclaimer that these are not long-term solutions suggests high costs; applicants should compare rates and terms carefully or explore lower-cost payday alternatives before committing.
services: Title loans secured by vehicle title up to $50,000
Personal loans up to $50,000 (higher credit score recommended)
In-person application and funding at Detroit location
Phone-based customer support and loan inquiries
